summary: Decent soundboard capture with a tight Seastones‑Dark Star‑Dew sequence, but the rest of the set feels uneven.
review: The recording offers clear sound on the standout Seastones > Dark Star > Dew segment and the high‑energy second set, yet other portions drag and lack the same polish. Reviewers praise the tight jams and overall vibe while noting that the performance isn’t consistently strong across the entire show. The source is a solid soundboard tape, though its appeal hinges on the highlighted moments.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers enjoy the second‑set jams and the Dark Star sequence (show strength) but note uneven performance and only decent recording quality, leading to a solid yet not outstanding rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear and pleasant on Seastones > Dark Star > Dew; overall mix is decent but some sections feel off‑balance, leading to a slightly uneven listening experience.

standout_songs: Goin' Down the Road Feels Bad
show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set shines with tight jams and high energy, while the rest of the show drags and lacks the same fluidity.
